access_keys.description: Access keys are used to authenticate the API requests. You can create a new access key by clicking the button above.

order.title: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
order.description: This action cannot be undone. This will also cancel all the items in this order.

color.label: Category Color
color.description: Select a color for the category. This color will be used to identify the category in chart.

chart.title: Sale By Category
chart.description: View the category chart to see the sales of each category.

change_password.title: Change password for {{username}}
change_password.description: Change your password to keep your account secure.

store.title: Store Configuration
store.description: In this section, you can configure the store settings. Like Name, Address, Phone Number, Logo, etc.

card.title: Coupon {{code}}
card.description: View the coupon information and manage the coupon settings.

description.title: Each coupon has a title to identify the coupon.
description.type: The coupon can be applied to the product, order, category, or shipping.
description.code: The coupon code is used to apply the discount.

apply.title: Apply Coupon
apply.description: Enter the coupon code to apply the discount.

category.title: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
category.description: This action cannot be undone. By deleting this category, all the products in this category will also be deleted.

device.title: Are you sure you want to delete this device?
device.description: This action cannot be undone. By deleting this device, the user will not be able to use the application.

product.title: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
product.description: This action cannot be undone. By deleting this product, the product will be removed from the system.

store.title: Are you sure you want to delete this store?
store.description: This action cannot be undone. By deleting this store, all the data related to this store will be removed from the system.

device.title: Device {{webToken}}
device.description: View the device information and manage the device settings.

image.drop_click: Drag and drop an image or click to browse
image.only: Only *.jpeg and *.png images will be accepted

vat.label: VAT Rate (%)
vat.description: Enter the VAT rate in percentage. For example, if the VAT rate is 10%, enter 10.

exchange_rate.label: Exchange Rate From USD ($) to Riel (៛)
exchange_rate.description: Enter the exchange rate between USD ($) and Riel (៛). For example, if 1 USD is equal to 4000 Riel, enter 4000.

invoice_prefix.label: Invoice Prefix
invoice_prefix.description: Enter the prefix for the invoice number. For example, if the prefix is 'INV', the invoice number will be 'INV-2021-0001'.

invoice_sequence_length.label: Invoice Sequence Length
invoice_sequence_length.description: Enter the length of the sequence for the invoice number. For example, if the sequence length is 4, the invoice number will be 'INV-2021-0001'.

table_number_min.label: Minimum Table Number
table_number_min.description: Enter the minimum table number for the restaurant. For example, if the minimum table number is 1, the table number will start from 1.

table_number_max.label: Maximum Table Number
table_number_max.description: Enter the maximum table number for the restaurant. For example, if the maximum table number is 100, the table number will end at 100.

auto_device_approval.label: Need Device Approval
auto_device_approval.description: Enable this option if you want to approve the device before the user can use the application.

name.label: Store Name
name.description: Enter the name of the store.

sign_in.title: Sign In to the console section
sign_in.description: Please sign in to your account to access the console section.

access_key.description: This action will invalidate all existing access keys. But don't worry, you can always create new.
access_key.title: New Access Key

category.description: Create a new category to help you organize your products.
category.title: New Category

coupon.description: Create a new coupon by filling out the form below.
coupon.title: New Coupon

product.description: Create a new product by filling out the form below. You can also upload an image for the product.
product.title: New Product

store.description: Create a new store by filling out the form below.
store.title: New Store

table.description: Create a new table by filling out the form below.
table.title: New Table

template.description: Create a new evaluation template by filling out the form below. You can use this template to create new orders.
template.title: New Template

user.description: Create a new user by filling out the form below. You can also upload an image for the user.
user.title: New User

zone.description: Create a new zone by filling out the form below.
zone.title: New Zone

chart.title: Sale By Order
chart.description: View the order chart to see the sales of each order.

discount.title: Discount
discount.description: Apply the discount to the order. You can apply the discount in USD ($) or Riel (៛).

payment.description: Pay for the order {{invoiceNumber}} with the following payment methods.
payment.title: Payment

chart.title: Payment Method
chart.description: View the payment method chart to see the payment methods used by the customers.

chart.title: Sale By Product
chart.description: View the product chart to see the sales of each product.

color.label: Product Color
color.description: Select a color for the product. This color will be used to identify the product in chart.

store.title: Store
store.description: View the store information and manage the store settings.

unlinked.products: Products Not Linked To This Store
unlinked.employees: Employees Not Linked To This Store

required.title: Store Is Required
required.description: You must select a store to perform this action. Please select a store from the list below.

image.description: You can upload a new image for the user. If you don't want to change the image, leave this field empty.
You can upload a new image for the product. If you don't want to change the image, leave this field empty.

sign_up.title: Create a new account
sign_up.description: Fill out the form below to create a new account.
